mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_charge_order WHERE deleted = 0
AND (order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR charge_type LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM clinic_charge_order WHERE deleted = 0 AND charge_type = #{chargeType}
AND (order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR patient_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR status LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT id, order_no, registration_id, patient_id, patient_name, (SELECT p.gender FROM clinic_patient p WHERE p.id = patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) AS gender, (SELECT p.age FROM clinic_patient p WHERE p.id = patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) AS age, (SELECT p.phone FROM clinic_patient p WHERE p.id = patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) AS phone, charge_type, department_name, doctor_name, receivable_amount, discount_amount, paid_amount, refund_amount, pay_method, refund_method, status, cashier, paid_at, refunded_at, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_charge_order WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, order_no, registration_id, patient_id, patient_name, (SELECT p.gender FROM clinic_patient p WHERE p.id = patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) AS gender, (SELECT p.age FROM clinic_patient p WHERE p.id = patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) AS age, (SELECT p.phone FROM clinic_patient p WHERE p.id = patient_id AND p.deleted = 0 LIMIT 1) AS phone, charge_type, department_name, doctor_name, receivable_amount, discount_amount, paid_amount, refund_amount, pay_method, refund_method, status, cashier, paid_at, refunded_at, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted FROM clinic_charge_order WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clinic_charge_order (order_no, registration_id, patient_id, patient_name, charge_type, department_name, doctor_name, receivable_amount, discount_amount, paid_amount, refund_amount, pay_method, refund_method, status, cashier, paid_at, refunded_at, remark, created_at, updated_at, deleted) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{registrationId}, #{patientId}, #{patientName}, #{chargeType}, #{departmentName}, #{doctorName}, #{receivableAmount}, #{discountAmount}, #{paidAmount}, #{refundAmount}, #{payMethod}, #{refundMethod}, #{status}, #{cashier}, #{paidAt}, #{refundedAt}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{deleted})
mapper.update:
UPDATE clinic_charge_order
order_no = #{orderNo}, registration_id = #{registrationId}, patient_id = #{patientId}, patient_name = #{patientName}, charge_type = #{chargeType}, department_name = #{departmentName}, doctor_name = #{doctorName}, receivable_amount = #{receivableAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, paid_amount = #{paidAmount}, refund_amount = #{refundAmount}, pay_method = #{payMethod}, refund_method = #{refundMethod}, status = #{status}, cashier = #{cashier}, paid_at = #{paidAt}, refunded_at = #{refundedAt}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, deleted = #{deleted},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
